name: Opole Voivodeship (Poland)

colors.symbolism: the gold field of the Upper Silesian arms
the blue eagle of Upper Silesia

description: Two horizontal stripes — yellow over blue — with the yellow stripe twice the width of the blue.
history: Adopted by the Opole Voivodeship in 2001, drawing on the historic heraldic tinctures of Upper Silesia.

features.symbolism: the heraldic colours of Upper Silesia, taken from the gold field and blue charge of the regional coat of arms
